---
title: "resolve_cstar.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\.agents\skills\corvus-control\scripts\resolve_cstar.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.25
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.50
---

## Intent
The `resolve_cstar.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on resolve. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via resolve. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `resolve`
